headline: J.B. Hunt Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Improve Year Over Year
summary: JBHT beats Q1 estimates as revenues rise 4.6% and EPS jumps 27%, led by record Intermodal volume and productivity-driven margin gains.

headline: United (UAL) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for United (UAL), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: What's Going On With American Airlines Stock Thursday?
summary: American Airlines Group Inc (NASDAQ: AAL) stock rises Thursday as UBS raises its price target to $16 and investors weigh United Airlines merger rumors.

headline: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down
summary: Airlines have raised airfare, fuel surcharges and baggage fees this year to help cover a surge in fuel costs since the Iran war started on Feb. 28.

raw.headline: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down

headline: Elon Musk Touts Starship Booster As The 'Most Powerful Moving Object Ever' After Successful Static Fire Test
summary: Elon Musk hails Starship's successful test, touting the Super Heavy booster as the most powerful moving object ever made.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trading the truce and the Lebanon dilemma
summary: The S&P, Nasdaq and Nikkei all top new record highs on optimism of an extended truce between the U.S. and Israel, as well as talks with Lebanon.

headline: We might see some Asian airlines consolidate to create scale: OAG Aviation
summary: Mayur Patel, Asia Pacific commercial and industry affairs lead at OAG Aviation, discusses the proposed merger of United Airlines and American Airlines, and says that some Asian airlines might similarly look to consolidate so as to increase their competitiveness against U.S. and Middle Eastern carriers. He also discusses the main winners and losers in the aviation industry as a result of the Iran war.
